function.message: I could not complete the deletion request because only one of the two referenced projects is canonically present. I found Petra’s parts library project at `40_projects/2026_04_28_studio_parts_library/README.MD`, but no `BlueMesa Quotebook` project record/folder in `40_projects/` (or by broader workspace search). Please provide the canonical BlueMesa project path/name so I can compare start dates and delete the earlier one safely.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required startup sequence (tree, root AGENTS, context), read relevant workflow docs before task work, treated inbox as non-canonical, and did not mutate workspace when canonical support was missing.
function.outcome_justification: `process-next-inbox-item.md` and `00_inbox/AGENTS.MD` require verification against canonical lanes and no mutation when blocked on missing canonical support. Only one target project could be verified canonically; the second was absent, so deleting anything would require guessing.
